segment.source: Your browser does not support the audio element.
Text, media, stories, resources, and reusable editorial building blocks.
Forms, offers, calls to action, and focused steps toward visitor intent.
Charts, metrics, tables, KPIs, and structured data displays.
Feature sections, benefit grids, product explanations, and service highlights.
Footer layouts, legal links, contact routes, app links, and page-end utility content.
Opening sections for landing pages, products, campaigns, search, video, and launch moments.
Menus, breadcrumbs, tabs, steps, pagination, headers, and other orientation patterns.
Pricing tables, plan cards, calculators, package comparisons, and buying decision aids.
Testimonials, reviews, ratings, customer logos, partner proof, and credibility signals.
Team profiles, departments, founders, advisors, company culture, and career content.
Try a different or more general search term.

Overrides the site-wide shadcn theme preset for this page and everything below it. Leave empty to inherit from the parent page or the site setting.
